# ckw-skills

> ckw-skills is Conner K. Ward's Claude Code plugin marketplace of skills and MCP servers тАФ human-in-the-loop studios, deterministic design tooling, and personal-data search.

## Install (Claude Code)
- Add the marketplace: `/plugin marketplace add connerkward/ckw-skills`
- Install any plugin: `/plugin install <name>@connerkward` (e.g. `lookdev`, `deterministic-design`, `ckw-design`, `screenstudio-alt`, `web-media-getter`, `macos-screen-recorder`, `lookdev-auto`, `apple-notes`, `muser`, `skeuo`)

## Plugins
- lookdev тАФ a human-in-the-loop web studio to tune AI-generated output by eye: https://github.com/connerkward/lookdev-studio-skill
- deterministic-design тАФ render the UI and prove it's balanced + usable (layout audit + vision-judged usability): https://github.com/connerkward/deterministic-design-skill
- ckw-design тАФ Conner K. Ward's frontend design skill (direction, design system, visual philosophy): https://github.com/connerkward/ckw-design-skill
- screenstudio-alt тАФ open-source headless Screen Studio alternative (auto-zoom, idle speed-up, vertical export): https://github.com/connerkward/screenstudio-alternative-skill
- web-media-getter тАФ one query across free image/video/GIF APIs, license-tagged results: https://github.com/connerkward/web-media-getter-skill
- macos-screen-recorder тАФ macOS screen recorder with system audio via ScreenCaptureKit, CLI, no driver: https://github.com/connerkward/macos-screen-recorder-system-audio
- lookdev-auto тАФ automated visual tuning: a vision model rates rendered variants in a loop: https://github.com/connerkward/lookdev-auto-skill
- apple-notes тАФ MCP server for semantic search and connection-discovery across your own Apple Notes: https://github.com/connerkward/mcp-apple-notes
- muser тАФ local-first semantic image search (on-device CLIP/SigLIP + LanceDB): https://github.com/connerkward/Muser
- skeuo тАФ MCP server that turns a sentence into a working skeuomorphic music-player skin: https://github.com/connerkward/skeuo-mcp

## Optional
- Author: Conner K. Ward тАФ https://github.com/connerkward
